generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane operation parameters stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane system created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization tool for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for real-time dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaDataVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ArduinoControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for data collection and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorControllersEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Motor controllers for stepper motor operation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling software for crane design"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating optimal trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical crane operation data in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance GrafanaDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based dashboard for real-time visualization with confidence bounds"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating trajectory testing of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for fault localization using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationAlertInsight
]

instance RealTimeDashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization with confidence bounds for operational decisions"
]

instance FaultLocalizationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization alerts generated from time series classification"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trajectory optimization insights for operational decisions"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results from comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from simulation testing of trajectories"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for crane operations"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement of gantry crane"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement of gantry crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup and manipulation"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the gantry crane system"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power Supply Unit providing electrical power to the crane system"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for collecting and processing sensor data"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorControllers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor controllers for stepper motor operation"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CraneFrame, PowerSupplyUnit, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, ArduinoMicrocontroller, TMC4671EvalMotorControllers
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and executed by the Control Application through the Physical Crane Interface to drive motors and electromagnet for movement and container handling."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation services operating at near-instantaneous rates, as evidenced by real-time dashboard traces and continuous comparison of measurements and simulations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture with physical components (crane hardware, interface, control, logging, HMI) and digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) deployed on a single personal computer using Docker for database, broker, and dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and 'as operated' (real-time monitoring and control during operation), but does not address 'as manufactured' phase."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real measurements with simulations using distance metrics against thresholds; dashboard displays confidence bounds from simulations to indicate validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication within a local network on a single PC."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized services (database, MQTT broker, dashboard) and Python module (gantrylib) installed via pip, all deployed on a personal computer."
]
